headlines.headline: Calvis Sciences reports 3% increase in customer acquisition

sentiment.reasoning: A 3% increase in customer acquisition is a modest positive indicator of growth momentum.

headlines.headline: Calvis Sciences opens new office in Latin America

sentiment.reasoning: Opening a new office is a positive operational step toward regional expansion.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
